title: Selected points highlighted in yellow
capture_instructions: The drag is complete. A region of road points is now highlighted bright yellow in the 3D viewport. All non-selected points retain their Classification color (grey roads, green trees, etc.). The selection rectangle is no longer visible (it disappears on release). The class picker panel is NOT yet open — this screenshot is taken immediately after releasing the mouse button, before the class picker appears or after it has appeared below/beside the selection.
ui_state: Reclassify Points active, Drag-Select mode, selection complete, points highlighted yellow
